text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, as I'm passing by the park, I notice a
handful of stalls have been set up...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Aaargh!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Inside one of them—a yakisoba dog stall—I find
Tamamo Cross with her head in her hands.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Trainer! Nice timin'... Do you, uh, want one of
these?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She hands me a delicious-looking yakisoba dog.
choice_data_list: Sure thing, but... this feels a little random.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Guess it would, huh! Yep, toootally get where
you're comin' from.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
See, the lady who owns this shop 'n I are real
tight. She used to have this bakery, and she was
real good to me.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
She'd gimme the leftover crusts for free, which
really helped me cut down on my food spendin'...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
So when I heard she was openin' a yakisoba dog
place, I figured I'd work the store for her to show
my thanks. But...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: I'm barely sellin' anythin' here. Sigh...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
...Wait, I can't just give up and gripe! I gotta do
somethin'!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I just gotta put on my thinkin' cap 'n show off
some of that Naniwa-style merchandisin' mojo!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tamamo Cross stands there awhile, her brow
furrowed in thought...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
C'mon brain, gimme a lightbulb moment here.
How can we get people to buy up all this stock...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Oh!
choice_data_list: Have you come up with an idea?!
Have you come up with an idea?!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
You bet I have! We'll have an "All-You-Can-Stuff"
sale!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Ya know, like they do with cucumbers! Ya grab your bag and cram as many cukes as ya can into the bag! It's a blast, and ya get a bargain!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Let's take that idea 'n let 'em stuff all the
yakisoba they want into the buns we got!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
If we play our cards right, we can source ourselves
heaps of yakisoba 'n make a low-cost killin'!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
And since the customer can stuff the dogs to their
likin', they'll get to eat as much as they want.
Plus, an idea this innovative is sure to turn heads!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Okay, with that settled, we just gotta decide
price. Just needa look at the cost of the noodle
ingredients... Considerin' this is an
"All-You-Can-Stuff" deal, we can probs up the
price a wee bit...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Hehehe, now we're cookin'!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Precisely as Tamamo Cross planned, her
unconventional strategy brings in the crowds, and
we sell out by sunset!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
...Yep, at times like these, an abacus really is your
best friend.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tamamo Cross quietly starts calculating using her
abacus.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Ingredients... Utilities... One dog'll net us 'bout
this much, so we'll need to sell around this many
to keep us in the black...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Oh, and we gotta keep an eye on the competition
and see how they're pricin' things. A'ight, I'm
gonna go do some snoopin'!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After a frantic but thorough lap around the other
stalls...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: All done!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tamamo Cross's new pricing scheme includes a
deal offering two dogs for a drastically reduced
price!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
While I was out doin' recon, I noticed a lotta
customers buyin' stuff in multiples.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Some were buyin' for their pals, but Umamusume
tend to eat a whole lot on their own too!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
If we sell these dogs usin' a set deal 'n reach our
target that way, I can see us makin' a decent
profit!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
And now to call in the customers! We're openin'
for business!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tamamo Cross's booming voice echoes around
the stalls... and before long, our yakisoba dog
sales skyrocket!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Nooo! I can't come up with any good ideas!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
But we're outta time... Screw it, desperate times
call for desperate measures!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tamamo Cross grabs the price marker, then
drastically slashes the displayed price.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I didn't wanna do this, but if we sell 80% of these
dogs, we can break even, and if we sell 90% of
'em, well... That nets us an okay profit!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
A true merchant never backs down from a
challenge! I gotta go all out!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Come one, come all! We got dogs for reeeal
cheap over here!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Although the dogs prove to be something of a
tough sell... in the end, we manage to break even!
